data.title: OpenSea goes multichain after 98% drop in volume
data.description:
OpenSea is airdropping a token, relaunching its website, cutting fees, and adding blockchains. Trading volumes, however, are still declining.
The post OpenSea goes multichain after 98% drop in volume appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/opensea-goes-multichain-after-98-drop-in-volume/

data.title: Cardano Echoes 2020-2021 Pattern – Is A Parabolic Rally On The Horizon?
data.description:
Cardano is trading below the $0.80 mark as it flirts with a potential rebound after weeks of volatility and selling pressure. The broader crypto market is finding strong demand at current levels, and investors are cautiously optimistic about a quick recovery rally into multi-year highs. Despite the bearish sentiment that has gripped the market recently, many believe that Cardano could lead the...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardano-echoes-2020-2021-pattern-is-a-parabolic-rally-on-the-horizon/

data.title: South Korea reviews ban on corporations trading virtual assets
data.description:
South Korea lifts crypto ban for companies. The ban lift has been structured in a two-phase plan. The move coincides with the enactment and enforcement of South Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act. South Korea’s Financial Services Commission (FSC) has announced plans to gradually lift the ban on corporations trading virtual assets, signaling a new […]
The post South Korea reviews ban on...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/south-korea-reviews-ban-on-corporations-trading-virtual-assets/

data.title: Trump Teases New Reciprocal Tariffs to Level Global Trade Playing Field
data.description:
The post Trump Teases New Reciprocal Tariffs to Level Global Trade Playing Field appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
President Donald Trump teased on Truth Social Thursday a new round of reciprocal tariffs, aiming to match the higher rates other countries charge on American imports. He described it as “THE BIG ONE” in his post, calling it a key step to “MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.”...

data.title: Fed’s Waller Champions Stablecoins as Key to Future Payments
data.description:
Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller has emphasized the importance of stablecoins in modernizing payments and expanding the U.S. dollar’s global influence.

The post Fed’s Waller Champions Stablecoins as Key to Future Payments first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Tether CEO Fires Back at JPMorgan Over Bitcoin Sell-Off Claim
data.description:
The post Tether CEO Fires Back at JPMorgan Over Bitcoin Sell-Off Claim appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
JPMorgan recently suggested that Tether may need to sell some of its assets, including its large Bitcoin holdings, to comply with potential new U.S. stablecoin regulations. To this, Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, has fired back at JPMorgan, accusing its analysts of being “salty”...
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/tether-ceo-fires-back-at-jpmorgan-over-bitcoin-sell-off-claim/
